# Patch Notes for Society

Patch Notes for Society is a civic systems project: first-principles breakdowns of public systems we inherited, the bugs they create, and the upgrades worth testing next.

The public v0.1 pages are drafts for critique and revision, not final policy submissions. The policy track is separate: evidence matrices, reviewer packets, and submission-grade memos under The Better Systems Project.

Primary site: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/
Repository: https://github.com/sethusehitch/patch-notes-society
Feedback forms: https://github.com/sethusehitch/patch-notes-society/issues/new/choose
v0.2 review hub: https://github.com/sethusehitch/patch-notes-society/issues/1
Contributing guide: https://github.com/sethusehitch/patch-notes-society/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
Triage guide: https://github.com/sethusehitch/patch-notes-society/blob/main/TRIAGE.md
Share kit: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/share.html
Reviewer queue: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/review-queue.html
Evidence and source index: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/evidence.html
Prisons policy memo reviewer bundle: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/expert/001-prisons-reviewer-bundle.html
Healthcare affordability pre-memo reviewer bundle: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/expert/003-healthcare-reviewer-bundle.html
Addiction / mental health pre-memo reviewer bundle: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/expert/005-addiction-mental-health-reviewer-bundle.html
RSS feed: https://sethusehitch.github.io/patch-notes-society/feed.xml
Release: https://github.com/sethusehitch/patch-notes-society/releases/tag/v0.1

## Review Standard

Useful feedback is specific:

- What is wrong or incomplete?
- Which incentive is missing?
- Which reform would backfire?
- What metric would be gamed?
- What source, case study, or operator reality should be added?
- Which paper should become a formal policy memo first?

Do not treat these pages as legal, medical, financial, crisis, public-safety, or case-specific advice.
